attributes.prompt: how much this increases the validity of any public benchmark claim
how much this lets another researcher reproduce or falsify the result
how feasible this is to execute without excessive provider spend or manual effort

description: Prioritize benchmark-design requirements for making a live method-comparison result publishable.

items.text: Run every method under a fixed provider-dollar cap and report how much agreement each method buys before the cap is exhausted.
Repeat the same suite across multiple candidate and reference models so method effects are separated from one model's quirks.
Collect a small human-adjudicated slice that can calibrate whether the live LLM reference itself is plausible.
Tag each disagreement by likely source: prompt ambiguity, reference brittleness, ratio-scale misuse, cost constraint, or genuine method weakness.
Freeze the case list, attributes, weights, models, budget policy, and scoring script before running a public benchmark.

name: benchmark_design_rigor
